name: ClawCut OpenClaw Adapter
description: Thin OpenClaw adapter for the local ClawCut command/query control surface.

configSchema.description: Configuration for the ClawCut OpenClaw adapter.

baseUrl.description: Local ClawCut control transport base URL.

token.description: Bearer token generated by ClawCut's local control transport.

enableReadOnlyTools.description: When true, read-only inspection tools are exposed automatically.

enabledMutatingTools.description: Explicit allowlist of mutating tools to expose.

enabledHighImpactTools.description: Explicit allowlist of high-impact tools to expose.
